mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM market_minute WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO market_minute (symbol, trade_time, open, high, low, close, volume, amount) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.tradeTime}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.close}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open = VALUES(open), high = VALUES(high), low = VALUES(low), close = VALUES(close), volume = VALUES(volume), amount = VALUES(amount)
